3023020.name: Cats in Wonderland
3023020.description:
😸 A portion of the profit from this game will be allocated to street cat rescue and support initiatives. 😻

Cats in Wonderland is a hidden object game where you need to find all the hidden cats in Wonderland. Explore the maps, find items to access new areas, and gather the resistance to defeat the Queen of Hearts.

Features:

​🎵​ Original soundtrack.

🐈 800 cats to find.
🎩 Organize the resistance.
🗝️ Collect items.
👑 Defeat the Queen of Hearts.
🗺️ Explore the world in whatever order you choose.
🐰 Interact with famous and charismatic characters.
🧩 Game experience designed for both think and relax.
3023020.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
